	CosPlugin)
LinuxPolicyc
Test whether line is empty of contains a comment.
        Test whether the ``line`` argument is either blank, or a
        whole-line comment.
        :param line: the line of text to be checked.
        :returns: ``True`` if the line is blank or a comment,
                  and ``False`` otherwise.
        :rtype: bool
